projects.name: G7 GovAI Grand Challenge RIA
projects.details: Led 3-person team. Bilingual NLP hybrid search over 397k Canadian federal law docs (Justice Laws XML). Neo4j graph + Elasticsearch BM25+vector → sub-500ms Gemini RAG Q&A. Won G7 GovAI Grand Challenge. Tech: Python, FastAPI, Elasticsearch, Neo4j, SentenceTransformers, React/TypeScript, Docker.

projects.name: SIGNAL-ZERO
projects.details: Winner 'Best Use of Solace Agent' at Solace Build to Convert Hackathon. 5-agent FastMCP bot/fake-review detection system with real-time Vaadin UI on Solace PubSub+ Agent Mesh. Tech: Java 17, Python FastMCP, Solace PubSub+, Spring Boot, Vaadin, PostgreSQL.

projects.name: Answer42
projects.details: 9-agent Spring Batch pipeline for academic paper analysis. Multi-source discovery (Crossref, Semantic Scholar, Perplexity), three-mode AI chat (Claude/GPT-4/Perplexity). Tech: Java 21, Spring Boot/Batch/AI, Vaadin 24, PostgreSQL/Supabase, Ollama. Agentic harness and AI-TDD methodology applied throughout.

projects.name: RL Environments
projects.details: Gymnasium-compliant reinforcement learning environment for B2B SaaS support ticket routing by agent expertise and workload. Tech: Python, scikit-learn, Stable-Baselines3, Streamlit.

projects.name: Grizz-AI
projects.details: Multi-model GenAI creative media studio orchestrating OpenAI, ElevenLabs TTS, Groq, Flux image models. Tech: Python, Flask/FastAPI, SQLite.

projects.name: TPG/USPS JMS Platform
projects.details: 9-year JMS lead processing millions of USPS shipment tracking events/day. Designed IBM WebSphere JMS queues + JAXB XML processing, RESTful services on Tapestry 5, jOOQ data abstraction, Quartz scheduling, Oracle 11g. Full-stack Java contract. No AI/LLM component — pure enterprise JMS/Java infrastructure.

projects.name: CIHR Federal Health Research Portal
projects.details: Federal health research funding portal. Apache Solr 4 search over Oracle 10g, Spring Framework, custom PDF generation, WCAG 2.0. Ottawa GovTech.

projects.name: Shared Services Canada Telecom Ordering
projects.details: Nationwide telecom equipment ordering system. Oracle ADF/JSF, BC4J, ADF Security (nationwide SSO), Oracle WebLogic. Ottawa GovTech.

projects.name: Public Works Canada JVM Engineering
projects.details: JVM performance engineering — resolved critical CMDB (ABITS) instability on Tomcat 5.5 using JRockit JVM and Oracle Mission Control. Java 32/64-bit memory analysis. Ottawa GovTech.

projects.name: Citizenship and Immigration Canada FCRO
projects.details: FCRO tracking system for overseas credential recognition. Spring MVC/Tomcat, Sybase SQL stored procedures, Spring WebFlow, WCAG 2.0. Ottawa GovTech.

projects.name: NameMedia / BuyDomains Search
projects.details: Converted internal search to Apache Lucene/Solr — first Solr production deployment. Re-architected e-commerce checkout with Konakart (up-sell, cross-sell, coupons). Spring MVC, Hibernate, MySQL. Waltham MA.

projects.name: GiglGate — Orange Labs NLP
projects.details: Built GiglGate: Java servlets integrating GATE NLP engine, JAPE grammars, SSML output for Loquendo TTS. GiglMix WAV sequencer with sound normalization. Classical rule-based NLP, not LLMs. Cambridge MA.

projects.name: Idearc Media / Superpages Analytics
projects.details: BIRT analytics reporting platform + maps.superpages.com (MS Virtual Earth, DWR AJAX/JSON). Spring MVC, Hibernate, Oracle 10g/MySQL. Waltham MA.

projects.name: Verizon Business XSD Data Mapping
projects.details: Enterprise XSD data mapping tools (Java Swing + IBM WebSphere/DB2) for cross-application integration. Colorado Springs CO.

projects.name: TalentExit HR Platform
projects.details: TalentExit HR exit-survey platform for Talentmap. JSF, PostgreSQL, Container Managed Persistence, Sun Application Server. Ottawa.

projects.name: TiniTerra Embedded Java PLC
projects.details: TiniTerra — embedded Java PLC for greenhouse environmental control. Custom Ladder Logic compiler with finite-state machine, TINI SIM (Dallas Semiconductors), threaded web server. Ottawa.

projects.name: HAPI Compiler — HL7 XML
projects.details: HAPI Compiler — HL7 XML → Java class generator for healthcare integration. Xerces XML parser. Algonquin College capstone project, Toronto.

claims.text: Built sub-500ms Gemini RAG over 397k Canadian federal law documents using Neo4j graph + Elasticsearch BM25+vector hybrid search for the G7 GovAI Grand Challenge.
Led JMS platform processing millions of USPS shipment tracking events per day for 9 years at TPG Technology Consulting (2014–2023).
Won 'Best Use of Solace Agent' at the Solace Build to Convert Hackathon with SIGNAL-ZERO, a 5-agent FastMCP bot/fake-review detection system on Solace PubSub+ Agent Mesh.
Three production Solr/Lucene/Elasticsearch deployments: NameMedia (2008, first Solr), CIHR (2013, Solr 4 over Oracle), TPG/Elasticsearch (2014–present). 20+ years Java; search since 2008.
Practitioner and advocate of AI-TDD (AI-driven Test-Driven Development) with a custom multi-agent agentic harness covering design, planning, implementation, and testing across the full stack.
Built two multi-agent systems in 2025: Answer42 (9-agent Spring Batch/AI pipeline for academic paper analysis) and SIGNAL-ZERO (5-agent FastMCP on Solace PubSub+ Agent Mesh).
